vb_page_title: Vendor Blogs - API Security Reference Hub
vb_subtitle: Latest insights from leading API security vendors — automatically updated.
vb_about_salt: Pioneer in API security platforms. Specializes in API discovery, runtime protection, and posture governance using AI/ML-powered behavioral analysis.
vb_about_wallarm: Provides end-to-end API security including API threat prevention, API attack surface management, and real-time vulnerability detection.
vb_about_cequence: Specializes in Unified API Protection (UAP) — combining API discovery, compliance, and bot/fraud defense in a single platform.
vb_about_imperva: Comprehensive application and data security provider. Offers API security as part of a broader WAF, DDoS protection, and data security portfolio.
